stress_signatures: A true cold-season green: above the band the tender rosette bolts and loses its nutty, buttery character.
Loose, stretched rosettes mean too little light for the slow cool pace it sets at.
harvest_markers: Cut the whole rosette while small, tight and deep-green — mâche is sold as a delicate whole-rosette green, not loose leaf.

story.he: מאש (חסת הטלה) מעמק הלואר — ירק עלים עדין וחורפי, אגוזי ובוטרי, נמכר כרוזטה שלמה. אוהב קור.
story.en: Mâche (Lamb's Lettuce) from the Loire — a delicate cold-season green, nutty and buttery, sold as a whole tender rosette. A true cold-lover.
